en: Solomon the son of David established himself in his kingdom, and the LORD his God was with him and made him exceedingly great.
zh: 大衛的兒子所羅門鞏固了他對以色列的統治，耶和華他的 神也和他同在，使他十分尊大。

en: Solomon spoke to all Israel, to the commanders of thousands and of hundreds, to the judges, and to all the leaders in all Israel, the heads of fathers' houses.
zh: 所羅門召喚全體以色列人、千夫長、百夫長、審判官、以色列的各領袖和眾家族的首領。

en: And Solomon, and all the assembly with him, went to the high place that was at Gibeon, for the tent of meeting of God, which Moses the servant of the LORD had made in the wilderness, was there.
zh: 所羅門和全體會眾一同到基遍的高地去，因為那裡有 神的會幕，就是耶和華的僕人摩西在曠野所做的。

en: (But David had brought up the ark of God from Kiriath-jearim to the place that David had prepared for it, for he had pitched a tent for it in Jerusalem.)
zh: 至於 神的約櫃，大衛已經從基列．耶琳抬到他預備好的地方，因為他曾在耶路撒冷為約櫃蓋搭了一個帳幕。

en: Moreover, the bronze altar that Bezalel the son of Uri, son of Hur, had made, was there before the tabernacle of the LORD. And Solomon and the assembly resorted to it.
zh: 戶珥的孫子、烏利的兒子比撒列所做的銅祭壇也在那裡，在耶和華的會幕前面；所羅門和會眾同去求問耶和華。

en: And Solomon went up there to the bronze altar before the LORD, which was at the tent of meeting, and offered a thousand burnt offerings on it.
zh: 所羅門上到耶和華會幕前面的銅祭壇旁邊，在壇上獻上了一千隻燔祭牲。

en: In that night God appeared to Solomon, and said to him, "Ask what I shall give you."
zh: 那一夜， 神向所羅門顯現，對他說：“你無論求甚麼，我必賜給你。”

en: And Solomon said to God, "You have shown great and steadfast love to David my father, and have made me king in his place.
zh: 所羅門對 神說：“你曾經向我的父親大衛大施慈愛，使我接續他作王。

en: O LORD God, let your word to David my father be now fulfilled, for you have made me king over a people as numerous as the dust of the earth.
zh: 耶和華 神啊，現在求你實現你向我的父親大衛應許的話；因為你立了我作王統治這好像地上的塵土那麼多的人民。

en: Give me now wisdom and knowledge to go out and come in before this people, for who can govern this people of yours, which is so great?"
zh: 現在求你賜我智慧和知識，使我可以領導這人民；否則，誰能治理你這眾多的人民呢？”

en: God answered Solomon, "Because this was in your heart, and you have not asked possessions, wealth, honor, or the life of those who hate you, and have not even asked long life, but have asked wisdom and knowledge for yourself that you may govern my people over whom I have made you king,
zh: 神對所羅門說：“你既然有這個心意：不求富足、財產、尊榮，也不求你敵人的性命，又不求長壽，只為自己求智慧和知識，好治理我的子民，就是我立你作王統治的人民，

en: wisdom and knowledge are granted to you. I will also give you riches, possessions, and honor, such as none of the kings had who were before you, and none after you shall have the like."
zh: 因此，智慧和知識必賜給你，我也把富足、財產和尊榮賜給你；在你以前的列王從沒有這樣，在你以後的也必沒有這樣。”

en: So Solomon came from the high place at Gibeon, from before the tent of meeting, to Jerusalem. And he reigned over Israel.
zh: 於是，所羅門從基遍高地的會幕 回到耶路撒冷，統治以色列。

en: Solomon gathered together chariots and horsemen. He had 1,400 chariots and 12,000 horsemen, whom he stationed in the chariot cities and with the king in Jerusalem.
zh: 所羅門召集了戰車和馬兵：他有戰車一千四百輛，馬兵一萬二千名；他把這些車馬安置在囤車城，或在耶路撒冷，和王在一起。

en: And the king made silver and gold as common in Jerusalem as stone, and he made cedar as plentiful as the sycamore of the Shephelah.
zh: 王在耶路撒冷積存的金銀好像石頭那麼多，積存的香柏木好像平原的桑樹那麼多。

en: And Solomon's import of horses was from Egypt and Kue, and the king's traders would buy them from Kue for a price.
zh: 所羅門擁有的馬，都是從埃及和古厄運來的，是王的商人從古厄照價買來的。

en: They imported a chariot from Egypt for 600 shekels of silver, and a horse for 150. Likewise through them these were exported to all the kings of the Hittites and the kings of Syria.
zh: 他們從埃及運上來的車，每輛價銀六千八百四十克；馬每匹一千七百一十克。赫人眾王和亞蘭眾王的車馬，也都是這樣經這些商人的手買來的。
